name: Cranberry-Orange Bread Machine Made
recipeInstructions:
1. Add yeast to flour mixture.
2. Stir in salt and milk powder.
3. Fold in applesauce, cranberries, and orange juice.
4. Select thin crust setting on bread machine.
5. Start the machine.
6. This recipe is really good!
7. Entered into MasterCook II and tested for you by Reggie Dwork (reggie@reggie.com).
